creator: bugs@hors-sujet.com
text:
Hello,

An verry annoying problem, when installed from port collection postfix admin depend explicitly from php72 and not the flavour, the result is a complete desinstallation of all the other port/pkg depending of php73 and the extentions :
[...]
Checking integrity... done (9 conflicting)

php72-session-7.2.21 [Synth] conflicts with php73-session-7.3.8 [installed] on /usr/local/include/php/ext/session/php_session.h
php72-7.2.21 [Synth] conflicts with php73-7.3.8 [installed] on /usr/local/bin/php
php72-openssl-7.2.21 [Synth] conflicts with php73-openssl-7.3.8 [installed] on /usr/local/include/php/ext/openssl/config.h
php72-xmlrpc-7.2.21 [Synth] conflicts with php73-xmlrpc-7.3.8 [installed] on /usr/local/include/php/ext/xmlrpc/libxmlrpc/xmlrpc_private.h
php72-xml-7.2.21 [Synth] conflicts with php73-xml-7.3.8 [installed] on /usr/local/include/php/ext/xml/php_xml.h
php72-pgsql-7.2.21 [Synth] conflicts with php73-pgsql-7.3.8 [installed] on /usr/local/include/php/ext/pgsql/php_pgsql.h
php72-mbstring-7.2.21 [Synth] conflicts with php73-mbstring-7.3.8 [installed] on /usr/local/include/php/ext/mbstring/php_mbregex.h
php72-phar-7.2.21 [Synth] conflicts with php73-phar-7.3.8 [installed] on /usr/local/include/php/ext/phar/func_interceptors.h
php72-hash-7.2.21 [Synth] conflicts with php73-hash-7.3.8 [installed] on /usr/local/include/php/ext/hash/php_hash_crc32_tables.h
Checking integrity... done (0 conflicting)
The following 106 package(s) will be affected (of 0 checked):
Installed packages to be REMOVED:
php73-xmlrpc-7.3.8
php73-xml-7.3.8
php73-7.3.8
php73-gettext-7.3.8
php73-extensions-1.0
php73-tidy-7.3.8
php73-session-7.3.8
php73-wddx-7.3.8
roundcube-php73-1.3.9,1
php73-dom-7.3.8
php73-xmlreader-7.3.8
[...]

postfixadmin installed from git working fine with php73 can you please honor flavours in the future release.

Regards
